title: nasturtium serra
intro: Nasturtium serra, also known as Indian cress, is a flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its bright, delicate flowers and edible leaves and seeds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high content of isothiocyanates and other bioactive compounds. Consuming Nasturtium serra leaves and seeds is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, supporting cardiovascular health, and aiding in the prevention of certain cancers. Nasturtium serra can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a culinary ingredient by adding the leaves and seeds to salads or using them as a garnish.
